summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Bella Cucina restaurant ordering system. All 23 backend APIs and 23 frontend features tested successfully. Full customer ordering flow (menu browsing → cart → checkout → order confirmation) and admin management system (login → dashboard → order management → status updates) working perfectly.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and 'Bella Cucina' restaurant name
Menu displays 5 categories (Pizza, Burgers, Sides, Drinks, Desserts) with 17 items total
Category filter pills work correctly (Pizza: 4 items, Burgers: 3 items, All: 17 items)
Menu item detail dialog opens with add-ons, quantity controls, and Add to Cart button
Quick-add buttons on menu cards add items to cart directly
Cart sheet opens from nav icon and shows items with quantity controls
Cart checkout button navigates to /checkout page successfully
Checkout form accepts customer details (name, phone, address) and order type toggle
Place order button creates order and redirects to /order/:id confirmation page
Order confirmation page shows status, progress tracker, and order details
Admin login works at /admin with credentials admin/admin123
Admin dashboard displays daily stats (3 orders, $64.96 revenue, 2 pending, $21.65 avg)
Admin order feed shows orders with status badges and action buttons
Admin can accept/reject orders and progress through all statuses (new→accepted→preparing→ready→completed)
Restaurant open/close toggle works on admin dashboard
All 22 backend API endpoints working correctly
GET /api/menu returns menu data with correct structure
GET /api/restaurant/settings returns Bella Cucina settings
POST /api/orders creates orders successfully
POST /api/admin/login returns JWT token for admin/admin123
GET /api/admin/orders returns orders with authentication
PATCH /api/admin/orders/:id/status updates order status with authentication
GET /api/admin/stats returns daily statistics
